5-sinif.title: 5th Grade
5-sinif.description: Strong subject foundations. 2 days/weekend, +16 lesson hours/week, study sessions and guidance support.
5-sinif.hero_quote: A strong foundation builds a bright future.
5-sinif.intro: Our 5th grade program aims to help students build a solid foundation in core subjects and adapt early to the LGS process.
5-sinif.body: Students attend courses 2 days on weekends (Saturday and Sunday). They receive +16 lesson hours in total. Extra weekly question-solving study sessions are held. Students attend study sessions 2 days per week on weekdays. They can ask their questions during one-on-one question-solving hours with teachers. Through the Kunduz program, students can ask teachers questions at any time and place. Recognition and attention tests are conducted by our Guidance Unit. Students' emotional and psychological states are reported. Progress charts are saved to our digital application. Students reinforce their knowledge through new-generation questions. Activities include exam preparation, LGS familiarization, supplementary school subject training, reading activities, attention-improving exercises, reading comprehension and test technique development.
5-sinif.phase1_text: In-depth coverage of Math, Science, Turkish and Social Studies topics.
5-sinif.phase2_text: Regular topic tests and assessment exams. Parent information reports.
5-sinif.phase3_text: Advisor teacher and guidance unit support that individually monitors each student's development.
5-sinif.result_text: Strong foundational knowledge, exam habits and a ready start toward the LGS process.
5-sinif.tech_intro: Weekend course (Sat-Sun), 2 weekday study sessions. Total +16 lesson hours.
5-sinif.tech_tools: Subject instruction · Test solving · Study sessions · Guidance
5-sinif.meta_title: 5th Grade Program | Halkalı Final LGS Academy
5-sinif.meta_description: Comprehensive +16-hour-per-week program with study sessions and guidance for 5th grade students.

6-sinif.hero_quote: Every reinforced piece of knowledge brings you one step closer to LGS.
6-sinif.intro: Our 6th grade program ensures students deeply grasp the middle school curriculum and transition to 7th grade prepared.
6-sinif.body: Students attend courses 2 days on weekends (Saturday and Sunday). They receive +16 lesson hours in total. Extra weekly question-solving study sessions are held. Students' emotional and psychological states are reported. Progress charts are saved to our digital application. Students reinforce their knowledge through new-generation questions. Activities include exam preparation, LGS familiarization, supplementary school subject training, reading activities, attention-improving exercises, reading comprehension and test technique development.

7-sinif.title: 7th Grade
7-sinif.description: Preparation for 8th grade by strengthening middle school foundations. +16 lesson hours per week, individual guidance and one-on-one Q&A.
7-sinif.hero_quote: A strong foundation builds a bright future.
7-sinif.intro: Our 7th grade program aims to help students build a solid foundation in Math, Science, Turkish and Social Studies.
7-sinif.body: Students attend courses 2 days on weekends and 2 days per week on weekdays. They receive +16 lesson hours in total. Question-solving study sessions and one-on-one question-solving are also conducted. They can ask their questions during one-on-one question-solving hours with teachers. Through the Kunduz program, students can ask teachers questions at any time and place. Students participate in weekly individual counseling sessions, personal study schedules are prepared and checked by our guidance unit, with parents informed weekly. Library access is available 7 days a week from 09:00 to 19:00. Professional tests and inventories are applied for each student. Attention tests are conducted and students' psychological and emotional states are added to their files. Each student is given a recognition exam and their level is determined. Individual study programs are prepared by our guidance units for each student. Students reinforce their knowledge through new-generation questions. Activities include exam preparation, LGS adaptation, test technique improvement, improving academic success, LGS mock exams, high school visits, speed reading and comprehension techniques, and attention-improving exercises. Study camps are organized including summer camp, mid-term camp, break camp and semester break camp.
7-sinif.phase1_text: In-depth coverage of Math, Science, Turkish and Social Studies topics.
7-sinif.phase2_text: Regular topic tests and assessment exams. Parent information reports.
7-sinif.phase3_text: Advisor teacher support that individually monitors each student's development process.
7-sinif.result_text: Strong foundational knowledge, exam habits and smooth transition to the 8th grade program.
7-sinif.tech_intro: 2 days on weekends and 2 days on weekdays. Total +16 lesson hours. Study sessions and one-on-one Q&A included.
7-sinif.tech_tools: Subject instruction · Test solving · Individual guidance · Camp programs
7-sinif.meta_title: 7th Grade Program | Halkalı Final LGS Academy
7-sinif.meta_description: Comprehensive +16-hour-per-week program with individual guidance and one-on-one Q&A for 7th grade students.

8-sinif.title: 8th Grade & LGS
8-sinif.description: Intensive LGS preparation. +16 lesson hours/week, weekly mock exams, AI-powered analysis and individual guidance.
8-sinif.hero_quote: With the right strategy and intensive study, your target school is within reach in LGS.
8-sinif.intro: Our 8th grade program is a comprehensive LGS-focused preparation process. It familiarizes students with the LGS format, maximizes their net score and closely monitors individual development.
8-sinif.body: Students attend 2 days on weekends and 2 days on weekdays. They receive +16 lesson hours in total. Each student can solve questions one-on-one with their teacher. They can ask their questions during one-on-one question-solving hours with teachers. Through the Kunduz program, students can reach teachers at any time and place. Students take one mock exam per week. After each mock exam, analyses are conducted and question banks are created based on their level and weak areas. The Baykuş library program (Hours: 19:00-22:00) allows evening study sessions under teacher supervision. Students participate in weekly individual counseling sessions and personal study schedules are prepared and checked by our guidance unit. Library access is available 7 days a week from 09:00 to 19:00. Motivation activities are conducted to eliminate distractions. LGS mock provizionals are held and AI-powered individual question banks are created. Guidance units prepare and monitor weekly individual programs. Activities include exam preparation, quality high school visits, goal setting, motivation events, reading comprehension and speed reading. Study camps include summer camp, mid-term camp, break camp and semester break camp.
8-sinif.phase1_text: Systematic revision of all LGS topics and weekly mock exams to address weak points.
8-sinif.phase2_text: Mock exam analyses and AI-powered individual question bank creation. Bayküş library program (Hours: 19:00-22:00).
8-sinif.phase3_text: Weekly individual guidance, motivation activities, quality high school introductions and camp programs.
8-sinif.result_text: Achieving a high net score in LGS and placing in a science high school, Anatolian high school or target quality high school.
8-sinif.tech_title: +16 lesson hours/week · Weekly mock exam · AI Analysis
8-sinif.tech_intro: 2 days on weekends and 2 days on weekdays. Total +16 lesson hours. Weekly mock exam and AI-powered analysis.
8-sinif.tech_tools: LGS topic revision · Weekly mock exam · AI analysis · Individual guidance
8-sinif.meta_title: 8th Grade & LGS Preparation | Halkalı Final LGS Academy
8-sinif.meta_description: Intensive +16-hour-per-week preparation program for LGS with weekly mock exams and AI-powered analysis.

deneme-kulubu.title: Mock Exam Club
deneme-kulubu.description: Regular LGS mock exams, net analysis and peer learning. Open to all grade levels.
deneme-kulubu.hero_quote: Every mock exam takes you one step forward.
deneme-kulubu.intro: The Mock Exam Club aims to provide regular exam experience to all middle school grade students. Weekly LGS format mock exams and detailed net analysis.
deneme-kulubu.body: Students continuously improve through group evaluation sessions and peer learning.
deneme-kulubu.phase1_text: Full weekly mock exams in LGS format. Practice under real exam conditions.
deneme-kulubu.phase2_text: Topic-based net analysis after mock exams, individual review of incorrectly answered questions.
deneme-kulubu.phase3_text: Group sessions where students evaluate together and peer learning.
deneme-kulubu.result_text: Continuously increasing net score, exam habits and strengthened confidence.
deneme-kulubu.tech_intro: Weekly mock exams in LGS format. Analysis sessions included.
deneme-kulubu.tech_tools: Weekly mock exam · Net analysis · Group evaluation · Progress tracking
deneme-kulubu.meta_title: Mock Exam Club | Halkalı Final LGS Academy
deneme-kulubu.meta_description: Weekly LGS format mock exams, net analysis and group evaluation.

rehberlik.title: Guidance
rehberlik.description: One-on-one psychological and academic guidance for career planning, motivation and exam anxiety.
rehberlik.hero_quote: Success comes with working in the right direction. Our guidance program helps you determine the direction.
rehberlik.intro: Our guidance program is a comprehensive counseling service that supports academic and personal development. Exam anxiety, career planning and parent communication are conducted together.
rehberlik.body: The process is transparently monitored through one-on-one sessions and regular parent reports.
rehberlik.phase1_text: One-on-one counseling on goal setting, field selection and creating a study plan.
rehberlik.phase2_text: Expert support for exam anxiety, low motivation and stress management.
rehberlik.phase3_text: Regular parent meetings and student progress reports.
rehberlik.result_text: Students with high confidence, goal-oriented focus and strong motivation.
rehberlik.tech_intro: One-on-one meeting opportunity with an expert teacher and counselor staff.
rehberlik.tech_tools: One-on-one sessions · Career plan · Parent report · Motivational support
rehberlik.meta_title: Guidance Program | Halkalı Final LGS Academy
rehberlik.meta_description: One-on-one guidance for career planning, exam anxiety management and motivation.

12-sinif-vip.title: 12th Grade VIP
12-sinif-vip.description: VIP classes of 5-8 students, 16 lesson hours/week, 45 mock exams and 40 hours of individual tutoring.
12-sinif-vip.hero_quote: In this final year before YKS, every student deserves individual attention – our VIP program delivers exactly that.
12-sinif-vip.intro: Our 12th Grade VIP program keeps class sizes between 5-8 students. Students attend a total of 16 lesson hours per week (two days on weekends, two days on weekdays). Each student can solve questions one-on-one with their teacher and receive up to 40 individual tutoring hours throughout the year.
12-sinif-vip.body: Through the Kunduz program, students can ask teachers questions anytime and anywhere. The Baykuş library program (Hours: 19:00-22:00) allows evening study sessions under teacher supervision. Mock exams are held every two weeks, and personalized study schedules targeting weak areas are prepared from analyses. Education coaches monitor these schedules weekly and share updates with parents. AI-powered individual question banks are created, and motivation workshops and concentration tests are applied regularly. University visits, goal-setting sessions, speed reading techniques, summer camps and mid-term camps are all integral parts of the program.
12-sinif-vip.phase1_text: 16 lesson hours/week in classes of 5-8 students. Individual attention guaranteed with up to 40 hours of personal tutoring per year.
12-sinif-vip.phase2_text: 45 TYT-AYT mock exams per year, national ranking results and AI-powered personal question bank creation.
12-sinif-vip.phase3_text: Weekly individual counseling, education coach monitoring, university introductions and regular parent updates.
12-sinif-vip.result_text: Reaching the target score in YKS and securing a place at the desired university by making the most of every moment throughout the year.
12-sinif-vip.tech_title: VIP Program · 16 lesson hours/week · 45 Mock Exams
12-sinif-vip.tech_intro: Intensive lessons in small classes, individual tutoring and AI-powered analysis offered together.
12-sinif-vip.tech_tools: Small class (5-8 students) · 16 hours/week · 45 mock exams · 40 hours tutoring
12-sinif-vip.meta_title: 12th Grade VIP | Halkalı Final LGS Academy
12-sinif-vip.meta_description: 12th Grade VIP program. 5-8 students per class, 16 hours/week, 45 mock exams and 40 hours of tutoring.

mezun-vip.title: Graduate VIP
mezun-vip.description: VIP classes of 5-8 students, 18 lesson hours/week, 2 mock exams per week and 40 hours of individual tutoring.
mezun-vip.hero_quote: Preparing for YKS one more year is not starting over – it is continuing stronger.
mezun-vip.intro: Our Graduate VIP program keeps class sizes between 5-8 students. Students receive a total of 18 lesson hours per week, take individual question-solving sessions with their teachers, and can access up to 40 individual tutoring hours throughout the year.
mezun-vip.body: Through the Kunduz program, students can reach teachers at any time and place. The Baykuş library program (Hours: 19:00-22:00) allows evening study under teacher supervision. Two mock exams are held per week, and AI-powered analyses create personalized question banks tailored to each student's level and weak areas. Weekly individual counseling sessions are conducted, coaches monitor programs and update parents regularly. The program begins with a Summer Camp for an early start, and university introduction events, motivation activities and camp programs are conducted throughout the year.
mezun-vip.phase1_text: 18 lesson hours/week in classes of 5-8 students. Up to 40 hours of individual tutoring and continuous teacher access.
mezun-vip.phase2_text: 2 YKS mock exams per week with AI-powered weak area analysis and student-specific question bank creation.
mezun-vip.phase3_text: Early start with a Summer Camp, weekly individual counseling, parent tracking and university introduction events.
mezun-vip.result_text: Achieve the target YKS score and secure admission to the desired university and department.
mezun-vip.tech_title: VIP Graduate Program · 18 lesson hours/week · 2 Mock Exams/Week
mezun-vip.tech_intro: Intensive lessons in small classes, AI-powered analysis and Summer Camp kickoff for a strong YKS preparation.
mezun-vip.tech_tools: Small class (5-8 students) · 18 hours/week · 2 mock exams/week · 40 hours tutoring
mezun-vip.meta_title: Graduate VIP | Halkalı Final LGS Academy

ozel-ders.title: Private Tutoring
ozel-ders.description: Fully personalized one-on-one lessons with expert instructors, tailored to each student's needs.
ozel-ders.hero_quote: Every student is unique; the greatest progress lies in a program designed just for you.
ozel-ders.intro: Our Private Tutoring program provides one-on-one guidance tailored to each student's needs and is designed to maximize academic achievement.
ozel-ders.body: Our expert instructors analyze each student's strengths and areas for improvement to create a fully personalized learning plan. This enables students to better understand topics they find challenging and achieve higher performance in exams.
ozel-ders.phase1_text: The student's current level and weak areas are identified to create a personalized roadmap.
ozel-ders.phase2_text: The expert instructor prepares a one-on-one lesson plan targeting identified weaknesses and implements it with the student.
ozel-ders.phase3_text: Progress is evaluated after every session and the program is updated according to the student's evolving needs.
ozel-ders.result_text: Eliminating weak areas, improving exam performance and reaching target scores.
ozel-ders.tech_intro: A personal learning experience fully shaped around the student's needs, guided by an expert instructor.
ozel-ders.tech_tools: One-on-one teaching · Personalized plan · Expert instructor · Continuous tracking
ozel-ders.meta_title: Private Tutoring | Halkalı Final LGS Academy
ozel-ders.meta_description: One-on-one private tutoring program. Personalized lesson plans with expert instructors.

About.meta_description: A well-established educational institution. Experienced teachers, individual tracking and proven LGS results.
About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: LGS Education in Halkalı
About.content: Halkalı Final LGS Academy was founded with the aim of providing quality LGS preparation education to students in the region. Over the years, we have helped thousands of students reach their target high schools.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: To be a trusted educational home where students in Halkalı and surrounding areas can access quality education in the easiest and most effective way.

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: To support every student in discovering their potential and reaching their academic goals. To make a difference with quality education, individual tracking and strong motivation.

founder.text: Quality in education is not a destination but an endless pursuit that continues in every student.

items.name: Elif K.
items.text: With the support I received throughout 8th grade, I reached my target score in LGS. Our teachers were truly very attentive.

items.name: Mehmet T. (Parent)
items.role: Child studying at a science high school via LGS
items.text: My son studied here in 7th and 8th grade and won a place at İstanbul Erkek Lisesi. We were amazed by the individual attention.

items.name: Selin A.
items.text: Thanks to the Mock Exam Club, my exam anxiety went away and I entered LGS with confidence. The guidance service was invaluable.

items.name: Kerem B.
